sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39675" key="e)pikentro/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπικεντρ-όομαι</orth>, Astron., <sense id="n39675.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">occupy a cardinal point</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-ούμενος</foreign> cj. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐπικεντρόμερος</foreign>, Antioch.Astr.in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(3).115</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
